overall.description: A first-person exploration of a neon-lit retro arcade and bar interior from a video game. The camera moves through vintage gaming machines on the ground floor, ascends a red-carpeted staircase, and explores an upper level lounge with pool tables before entering a private red-lit studio booth called Masala Studios. The environment features cyberpunk aesthetics with vibrant neon signage, industrial ceiling elements, and gritty urban decor.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit retro arcade with red carpet flooring. Vintage arcade cabinets line the walls while a tall digital advertising kiosk stands prominently in the center. Pink neon signage glows in the background as the camera moves steadily forward through the empty gaming area.

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions into a narrow stairwell, ascending red-carpeted steps. Graffiti-covered walls flank the left side while a bright pink neon arrow illuminates the path upward. Metal railings line the right side as the camera climbs toward the upper level.

segments.scene_description: Emerging at the top of the stairs, the scene opens into an upper level lounge. A pool table sits in the center while an American flag banner hangs on the far wall. The camera moves past a bar counter with green bottles and approaches a beaded curtain entrance to a back room.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate red-lit studio booth with beaded curtains and wall seating

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through beaded curtains into Masala Studios, a private booth bathed in red neon light. The space features leather banquette seating, a prominent MASALA STUDIOS sign with a flame logo, and various posters on red tiled walls. The camera explores the intimate space, revealing an industrial ceiling fixture and neon signage before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit retro arcade into an intimate, red-bathed private studio. It begins by gliding through an empty gaming area featuring vintage cabinets and a central digital kiosk under the glow of pink neon signage. As the camera reaches the back of the room, it transitions into a narrow stairwell, ascending red-carpeted steps flanked by graffiti-covered walls and a bright pink neon arrow. The scene then opens into an upper-level lounge, moving past a central pool table and a bar counter with green bottles before approaching a beaded curtain entrance. Finally, the camera passes through the curtains into Masala Studios, where the environment shifts to a private booth with red tiled walls, leather seating, and a prominent flame-logo sign under an industrial ceiling.
